title.en: So, Proz is still there recovering.

content.en:
Time passes.

Since the Dragonsman tribe is ready, and now they have blocked the territory, the situation here has not yet been leaked.

This gave the Dragonshire tribe enough time, and the Dragondisciples tribesmen everywhere also withdrew.

this day.

The four emperor-level existences of the Dragon Disciple Tribe broke through to the ancient demon level, one failed to break through and fell, and a few others are closer to the ancient demon level, and if they cultivate for a period of time, they are also qualified to impact the ancient demon level~.

At this moment, the four Ancient Demon Rank were discussing with the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

And the peak ancient demon-level existence Ploz is still recovering from his injuries, after all, the other party has just woken up from a deep sleep, even if the soul will has recovered, but the body has not yet recovered to its peak state.

So, Proz is still there recovering.

At this time, the four ancient demon-level beings of the Dragon Disciple Tribe were discussing how to deal with the Golden God Ministry.

"Ancestor, it won't be long before the Golden God Department will definitely find out the situation of our Dragon Disciple Tribe, and they will definitely deal with us when the time comes, what should we do now?"

Long Shu asked.

Long Ying pondered for a while and said, "The Golden God Department also has a peak ancient demon level existence, and Lord Proz can deal with that peak ancient demon level, but there is no certainty of victory. And the number of our ancient demon level is undoubtedly inferior to the Golden God Department, and the overall strength is still much worse. At present, there is only one way, and that is to contact other tribes, and I know that a tribe is very likely to have an ancient demon-level existence. "

"Which tribe?"

Long Shu asked curiously.

"Silver Serpent Tribe!" said the dragon shadow.

"What, it's the Silver Serpent Tribe?"

Several other Ancient Demon-level beings were shocked.

You must know that the Silver Snake Tribe is not strong, it is much weaker than their Dragon Disciple Tribe, there are only seven emperor-level existences, how can there be an ancient demon-level existence.

"Are you surprised? That's the power of the Silver Serpent Tribe, and they're so deep. Long Ying said: "It is precisely because the Silver Snake Tribe knows that the Golden God Department suppresses the major tribes, they dare not reveal their strength, that ancient demon-level existence is very hidden, and never cultivates members of the clan, so I was not targeted by the Golden God Ministry, I also accidentally visited the Silver Tribe, and sensed the crisis in the underworld, and then after many trials, it was determined that the Silver Snake Tribe existed in the ancient demon-level existence." "

"In addition to the Silver Snake Tribe, we also have to recruit other tribes, as long as a large number of tribes defect to us, we will not fall into the disadvantage of fighting below the ancient demon level. "

"And in the battle of the ancient demon level, the Golden God Department does not dare to kill the ancient demon level, and the ancient demon level is not allowed to kill the ancient demon level, otherwise it will be suppressed by the main department of the Luo mother. Therefore, we still have hope to compete with the Golden God Ministry, at least we can guarantee that we will not be destroyed by the Golden God Ministry. "

Dragon Shadow Road.

After that, one emperor level after another went to various tribes, and some powerful tribes, Dragon Shadow, and their ancient demon level all visited in person.

Of course, after this visit, the Golden God Ministry will definitely know, because there will definitely be tribes who secretly report to the Golden God Ministry, which is an inevitable situation.

But the Dragonspur Tribe had to do something, otherwise with their strength, once they fought against the Golden God Department alone, they would lose badly.

......

The Silver Serpent Tribe.

The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon came here in person, and the patriarch of the Silver Snake Tribe, the top emperor-level existence Snake Mist, was surprised: "Dragon Shadow, you broke through to the Ancient Demon level, how could you break through, you are not ......"

The snake mist is clear about the situation of the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon, it was impossible to break through before, although the Dragon Prisoner Technique is a secret, but the Silver Snake Tribe knows this secret.

As a result, today's Dragon Shadow has broken through.

"The Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon has become a family member of the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, breaking the shackles of the Dragon Prison Technique. "

A voice came.

Immediately afterward, a young man emerged from nothingness.

Seeing this person, Snake Mist said respectfully: "Ancestor!"

He is the ancestor of the Silver Snake tribe - Silver Baking!

Seeing the Silver Baked Ancient Demon, Long Ying didn't have any doubts, but said very calmly: "Silver Baked Ancient Demon, I want to form an alliance with the Silver Snake Tribe and fight against the Golden God Department!"

"Against the Golden God Ministry, you should know what the consequences are, just by virtue of you, you are not the opponent of the Golden God Department at all, even if you add that peak ancient demon level Proz, there is no way to compete. Silver Bake said.

"But if you unite other tribes, then there is hope, with the suppression of the Golden God Tribe, do you dare to expose the ancient demon level, and I am sure that among these hundreds of thousands of tribes, there must be more than us Ancient Demon level, if they are all united, it is enough to compete with the Golden God Ministry!"

"You should know that once you are exposed, the Golden God Department will inevitably seal you. The Golden God Department does not need other tribes to give birth to the Ancient Demon Level, and does not allow the existence that threatens his rule!"

Dragon Shadow reminded.

Yinyan was silent for a while, and then said: "Okay, I promise to cooperate with your dragon disciple tribe, but you are at least qualified to fight against the Golden God Tribe, and I will appear, if there is no hope at all, I will not make a move." "

"Good!"

Dragon Shadow agreed.

The years that followed.

The Dragonstooth Tribe has co-opted one tribe after another, but they are all secretly watching, and once the Dragonsman tribe shows strong resilience, these tribes will immediately confront the Golden God Ministry.

Meanwhile.

When the Golden God Department learned about the Dragon Disciple Tribe, it was immediately furious.

......

Golden God Department.

Ancient demon-level existences such as Jin Tu and Jiechi have all appeared, and this time it is not the six as rumored by the outside world, but the seven.

One of the most hidden peak ancient demon-level existences in the Golden God Department, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, has come out.

"Jin Slayer Ancient Demon, according to intelligence, the Dragon Disciple Tribe awakened the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, and transformed into the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon Dragon's Dragon Descendant Clan, and also gave birth to several ancient demon-level existences, breaking the shackles of the Dragon Prison Technique. The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said.

"Heaven Devouring Demon Dragon Ploz, that guy has woken up, it's indeed a trouble!" said the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon with a frown.

Before he broke through to become the ultimate ancient demon, he was not sure to deal with Plotz.

And the Golden God Tribe actually has more than seven Ancient Demon-level existences, but there are still several Ancient Demon-level existences in one battlefield, and now they can't come back at all.

"Inform me, let all the tribes gather the combat power above the king level to the Golden God Department, I will besiege the dragon disciple tribe!!!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon commanded.

"Yes!"

Soon, the word went down and all the tribes got orders.

......

Eagle Ministry.

He Lao received a summons from the Golden God Ministry, and he frowned a little for a while.

"Sure enough, the war is still coming!"

He Lao informed Ye Tian to come over, he wanted to discuss with Ye Tian, what should he do, should he go and besiege the Dragon Disciple Tribe?

But no matter how you choose, a medium tribe like them is cannon fodder!
